metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.10-beta.13
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Adds in-place numeric editing for Pitch, Rate, and Gain without layout reflow. - Restores parameter defaults by double-clicking the label or slider track. - Returns the metadata-panel toggle to the left workspace-control group. - Aligns the search field and toolbar icons to a shared 32-pixel height. - Keeps in-product guidance concise and moves technical detail to the user guide.
